recommended_insertion_point: Trial project only: insert a series 3-phase breaker on the IBR2_TRIAL local branch between the 0.6 kV side of transformer E_2_30_1 (component id 275469438) and the low-voltage multimeter that exports VIBR2, PIBR2, QIBR2 (component id 1433370859).

Trial project only: insert a series 3-phase breaker on the IBR3_TRIAL local branch between the 0.6 kV side of transformer E_2_30_1 (component id 1076244314) and the low-voltage multimeter that exports VIBR3, PIBR3, QIBR3 (component id 31436320).
